title: AN ACT REPEALING SECTION TEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTY-SIX

chunks.text:
H. No. 1209 / 45 OG No. 6, 2405 (June, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 344, March 14, 1949 ]

AN ACT REPEALING SECTION TEN OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTY-SIX

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section ten of Republic Act Numbered Fifty-six is hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, March 14, 1949.
